It does look and feel nice, but I wanted a silent keyboard since my pc is in my bedroom, and my husband goes to sleep hours before I do. The keys are also super high compared than what I'm used to. I like everything else about it, but it is going back to amazon.

They're a definite upgrade as far as headphones go (very good at noise cancellation and good sound quality), but the mic and the difficulty of using the controller plugin on the headphones loses it some points.

title: Good, with a few minor issues-
text: I had to replace my old Dymo printer (that was 20 years old) after purchasing some generic labels that gummed up the rollers beyond fixing. This model is much the same, but sometimes has a problem that is announced with a loud squeal when getting the labels started. Other than that, I really love these printers. We print about 500 labels every week, and until recently have never had an issue. I am hoping that this new printer will work through this minor feeding issue.

title: Misleading product photo; meh product.
text:
As others have mentioned, the product is not as pictured; very misleading to show the Color Endure Violet shampoo when it is the regular Color Endure shampoo. I still tried it and honestly, it was nothing special. I'll stick with Paul Mitchell Forever Blonde Platinum -- smells better and works great.

Joico should probably contact this seller to update their product listing to reflect what is actually shipped to the customer to avoid further negative reviews.

title: Totally OK

Figured I could get them much cheaper here at Amazon, but I was disappointed to find out that's just what they cost these days. I guess not as many people use them any more. So I got the smaller sized ones to save a little money. These Mead security envelopes are entirely adequate for my needs. I'm less than thrilled at the price, but I'm totally happy with the product.

title: Nice Magnification!
text: This mirror requires some assembly. It was easy to put together and took just a few minutes. The mirror has nice magnification and swivels well. The base is clear acrylic. It seems sturdy enough to support the weight of the mirror, but it doesn't look as nice as a solid stainless (or other metal material) base would look. I put this in my 18 year old's bathroom because she is not as concerned with the appearance (acrylic base) as I am.

title: Great for Dry Eyes
text:
These are great to use every day. There are a lot in the package, and I use them when I feel tired or want to target my eyes. They have a cool feeling and they really moisturize my skin, so I plan on using them from now on. I also like that there are tweezers included in the package for easier applicaton. Well worth the money.

title: It takes a bit to get used to

Once seated, it was easy to move grace up or down to adjust a comfortable spot. We haven’t taken a long trip yet however we both could feel how this may actually help ease the stiffness and back aches. Our next trip won’t be until fall however we are quite optimistic about these.

title: Worth the Money, with a catch
text:
For the price, this unit is amazing. If you are using built in smart TV speakers - this is for you. I have it connected using my optical out and RAW Bitstream.

Does make a buzz sound even when off. I didn't notice as I have it connected to a remote operated power strip and shut down the power to the wall entirely. The sound difference between 1-3 is negligible and 3-4 sounds like a full 3 decibel increase. They are not loud by industry standard.

Perfect for a small living room entry Home theatre. This is not for those coming from Bose or another high end brand.

title: Okay product

Not sure if it is because the headphones speakers are not adjustable or if it is the head phones themselves.

title: Brush applicator is lousy and the blue is not rich in color
text:
I have blue eyes and always used the Maybelline Royal Blue Mascara that I can no longer find in stores and which is way too expensive on Amazon. As a result, I decided to buy this mascara and I am very disappointed.

The mascara is not a deep rich blue like I expected. It also goes on very light and the applicator is horrendous. The brush head is a thick and thin twisting spiral that makes it practically impossible to apply a generous helping of mascara. In addition, the mascara almost seems dried out in the tube.

Overall, I'm very disappointed.

title: They work, but they charge at nearly 5.3V, which is not good.
text: These work fine, and they charge devices, but they charge at nearly 5.3V. The output on each USB port is only 1A, even if only one device is plugged in. A good charger will float around 4.9-5.1V so they do not burn out the charging ports/chips on devices. There are better devices out there.

I like the fact that you can get a "free" puzzle everyday when you download the current months puzzle pack. It does take quite awhile to build up enough coins to buy packs though. Of course you can buy coins through the app to get nicer puzzle packs. This is one of the few games I actually play ... And I play it almost daily.

title: Artful Coloring
text: I like this app. It worked very well and is addictive. The basic colors are nice and you are allowed to vote on a group of colors for the next day which changes nearly everyday. There are a nice variety of pictures to use the colors on. You can stop and save the picture you are working on if you need to. It also allows you to clear the colors and start over if you prefer. If you want additional colors or pictures, you have to purchase them. For the most part, I think it is a nice program. I recommend it.

text: [[VIDEOID:f3558a6fff96bdd2e36237f96cd5b891]] I have no idea how much these cost but the sound quality is disappointing to me. Setup was easy. title: Work great for my purposes ...
text: I really like these. So far, I've used them for marking research materials with notes for easier future reference, and for marking music "trouble spots" in scores for pieces I'm working on with my chorus. I like that they're see-through (translucent, not transparent). Like others, I've found that some pens have difficulty writing on the plastic surface. I found that [[ASIN:B00105ELEA Sharpie Ultra Fine Point Permanent Markers, 8 Colored Markers(37600PP)]] (or the equivalent permanent marker) works just fine. I'll be keeping a supply of these on hand for sure in the future.

text:
Though these are listed a “mailers”. . . Because they have the handle at the top. . . I think of them more as “totes”. They seal at the bottom, and once sealed, they are sealed for good, so they are not reusable once opened.

Poly mailers are quite strong and waterproof. They are also lightweight, so they don’t a lot to shipping costs.

These mailers are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. At the current price of thirty-four bucks. . . I think they are quite expensive, as they only cost pennies to make in China. Nonetheless, I quite like them.

I talk to Netflix, they blame the box or IP provider. WD blame Netflix and my ISP. Other than that, I love Netflix.

title: Combat disappoints
text: I was hoping for a "deep rpg" combat system but basically you setup scripts for your team to follow and then they battle automatically in real time. You can change things up during combat but all you are doing is picking another automated script. Ugh. It doesnt help that you are very very limited what abilities you can give these characters over the course of the game. And for equipment there is astonishingly little to choose from. There is a long epic story for those who like stories. But as an actual RPG? Not much here sadly.

title: Very well-made cable, works well for all the usual purposes
text:
Very well-made cable, works without problems. Slightly thicker than some others I have, but coils and uncoils nicely anyway.

The 10ft length is great for use in a car, and also for when you're on a couch with the power outlet at the other end.

The only minor criticism (or caution) I have is that the micro-usb end has a bulky housing. Makes it easier to handle, but also can get in the way with some phone/tablet cases that have only a small aperture for the socket.

title: Maybe for someone else, with bigger hands?

The mouse is just too big for me, my hand can barely fit around it and the buttons are all very far apart from each other. I'm an average sized woman with pretty averaged sized hands and i feel someone larger would be more suited for this mouse. I will be returning, unfortunately.

title: Miscalculated refund, poor online help
text:
The software is a bit clunky, but its cheaper than TurboTax. However, for the first time in 20 years, I got a letter from the IRS saying my tax return was incorrectly calculated and my refund was cut by about $1500. I followed HR Block program step by step. The math error was due to the program.

Also, they didn't have the program ready until mid Feb with the "updates." So I couldn't file until then.

I was not impressed at this error and will not be using this software again. I've never had any complicated returns. But apparently a simple return was too much for H&R Block.

title: roomy semi-hardshell case, not crush-resistant
text:
This is advertised as a "hardshell" case, but it is not really a hardshell case like the ABS or fiberglass cases that Amazon sells. The case stiffened EVA, which offers a little more protection from drops or bumps than most padded sleeves, but it is definitely not crush-resistant. I can squeeze the sides together with just finger pressure.

The case is roomy, which is great if you are carrying it alone and want your tablet and all your accessories inside the case. If you're not carrying many accessories, then the case is pretty bulky and may not fit easily in a briefcase or backpack.

title: Great until...
text: Shortage happened way too quickly.. my son got these for Christmas with his Nintendo Switch and only after a few months there was a shortage in the mic .. of course too late to return then..

title: Total Rehash
text: The campaign just flat sucked and was over after roughly 5 hours of gameplay. Online play is glitchy as all hell and the maps are really weak. Thumbs way down. This is the last COD title I'll be buying. Not impressed at all.

title: Disappointing
text: Cheaply made, really. I guess you get what you pay for. Although they are lightweight, which is what I was looking for, the sound quality and maximum volume is very very low. I cannot recommend these for gaming or for listening to anything really.

title: Great Headset BUT
text: I ordered 2 of these. One stopped working correctly a few weeks back. The customer service folks said they would replace it by Sept 7, and now they aren't responding. Ghosted. WHERE IS MY REPLACEMENT? Great Headset, unhappy with being ghosted. Will update review if they fix this issue .

title: Awesome!
text: Cows are awesome! My cow loving sister loved it!

title: great
text: Great shampoo for fine hair

title: Great way to keep your phone accessible without losing it.
text:
I work sporting events part time. My phone needs to be accessible and heard so I can talk to coworkers or supervisors. I had a coworker accidentally take my phone since they looked the same, so i needed a way to keep my phone attached yet out.
Hanging it around my neck felt heavy and odd at first but after a while I barely noticed. I did get lots of teasing comments from others as most of us grew up as latch-key kids (with a house key around our neck).
Overall, I'm happy. It now is part of my event wardrobe.

title: Writing fever
text: Without a doubt, this is the nicest fountain pen I have used in years. I bought others but they cannot compare to this one for the price. I purchased the fine point and I really enjoy writing with it. I am a writer of books, letters and cards and I am enjoying the ease and fluidity of this pen. Great fountain pen for this price. I really like it and I think others will as well.

title: Stopped working
text: For a while, it was great. But it now plays only a few minutes before stopping and going to a black screen.

title: Test everything as soon as you receive it
text: Unfortunately I gave away my old computer, received this one and went on the road for a month, otherwise I would have returned it. The keyboard letters are the same color as the keyboard and are almost unreadable, and the speakers are broken. I didn't know that until I had begun my trip. Otherwise, it's very fast and I had no problem loading drivers. The screen is acceptable. I hate paying a high price for something that is partially broken that shouldn't be, and I have to put up with that.

title: I keep these around for heat rash come warm weather.
text: Rashes and athletes foot issues are resolved in a week or so.

title: Near perfect old style turn based rpg
text: Great old school turn based rpg system with a modern look. I will be replaying this for years to come.

title: Works great for Rock Band as intended, but not Guitar Hero
text: I picked up this controller because I needed one for the PS3, and it works great for the Rock Band games (especially for the price!). However, I'm disappointed that it does not work with Guitar Hero. Many of the reviews said it worked just fine with GH, but I can't get it to work (all works except the colored buttons!). If it had worked with GH, I would have rated it a 5 of 5 stars.

title: Useful

I can be 2 feet from Alexa and say the wake up call, Alexa, and she will not respond, yet my TV speaker10 feet away and a comerical will com on that says , Alexa, and she responds
She does not respond correctly to distance correctly

title: Alternate solutions not recognized
text: The individual puzzles often have multiple solutions but the game is locked into one solution. the stated goal ( such as leave 2 squares ) is not as restrictive as the game ( which wanted 2 squares of different sizes ) I don't enjoy having to guess what the desired outcome actually is. fix that and it would be a great game.

title: Not as pictured
text: Mine did not come in Scotch box and the envelopes did not come with address square and return address square - just plain - will not buy from here again - tried to post picture but would not work

title: Perfect
text:
I've used this type of silicone padded pad for years. This is a replacement for a worn-out pad set. For wrist and palm support there's no better solution. Of particular note is the thermal isolation provided by the silicone palm rest from working on a granite top. Hours of palm on cold granite gets painful. The chill runs painfully to the wrist.

The design is fresh and brightens the worksurface drab. I love it.

title: One Star
text: Not even worth 14 bucks

title: Unhappy but Still Trying to Get Some Comfort
text: The pad is thin and gives some comfort. There is ABSOLUTELY NOTHING cooling about this pad. Also, I use this on my recliner and the pad constantly moves and rolls.

title: exactly as described
text: Really am enjoying this new cell phone case. I do wish it had some type of ring on it to hold it without possibility of slipping through my fingers. It is made of good quality material and I would buy again.

title: Doesn’t Hold Up
text: After a couple weeks regular usage it has started looking rough. I’ll probably trash it in one month.

title: Convenient way to keep all your games in 1 place
text: Does what it says it does. Fairly sturdy construction. makes packing many games into one place for travel very easy. If only it would force my son to put the games back in it when he was finished!

title: Fun variety of functional hair clips
text: We love the variety of clips. Some are silly (like the ear of corn). Our daughter has a cowlick in front center, so she needs a clip every day. This set helps her express herself and get excited about picking a clip to wear. So far, none have broken. Will update if there are any issues. Good size clips, neither too small or too big. Comes in a clear cylindrical plastic container with replaceable lid. Pleased with our purchase.

title: Meh
text: Works a bit better than a different brand, although even though I got this brand to stick, it looks and feels cheap, wrinkly a bit, a little cloudy, and then has a weird feel to it. Difficult to install "properly" even after watching their video. Not impressed.

title: WebRoot Anti-Virus
text: Great Product for a Great Price. Highly Recommend.

title: Non wipe able

title: Not a fan
text: It is a decent lap desk, but its much “cheaper” than my last and was kinda pricey! Its also flat, not an angle, and the cushions aren’t sturdy.

title: Handle broke quickly
text: Handle broke within a week of simple use. Broke in a way that I won't be able to crazy glue it back. Disappointing.

title: Do NOT Buy These--The Mic Will Stop Working Within a Few Months
text: We purchased this as a Christmas gift, and like so many other reviewers, the mic stopped working after a short time. The headphones both still work, but the mic is dead--as if it is muted, except there's no way to mute them on the headset themselves. I checked these out on two different computers as well, as I tend to record voice comments for students, and the mic is definitely dead. What a waste.

Update: they lose their stickiness very quickly. Also I had some unused pieces left and when I went to try to use them for some other lights the adhesive wasnt even sticky anymore? Not sure what that's about since they were just sitting in a drawer...

title: Gentle
text: This gel cleanser is gentle and does not annoy my sensitive skin, which is a plus. It's a clear, runny gel type consistency. It produces a little bit of foam. It has a light smell to it which I can't identify. I feel pretty neutral about the scent. It rinses easily and doesn't leave anything behind. I like this, but there are a lot of face cleansers that I like more.

title: It Works
text: Still not used to strapping it on quite yet, so I haven't figured out the most expedient way to do it, but it's easy to understand. This one's a little too short for my phone, however, the phone is so wide it fits tightly in the slot and I position it on my arm so the open end faces toward my shoulder, so I'm not afraid at all of the phone sliding out. Much better solution than putting the phone in my pants' pocket and letting the headphone wires impede the movement of my right arm.

title: One of the nicest facial creams on the market!
text: This is a really nice facial moisturizing cream. It is thick and luxurious to the touch, yet it applies evenly and thinly so it is absorbed quickly into the skin. I found it to be light, yet effective, and I can easily apply makeup after I use it. I love the way my skin feels after using daily for the past two weeks. Great presentation as well in the box and jar. Highly recommend as a good moisturizing cream!

Took it out to use today after not using for a few months after my initial use and it's completely dead. No jam, just junk. Don't even consider this one.

title: Easy to use and gentle on your hair.

title: Nice set of makeup and blending sponges but extremely overpriced
text: This is a nice set of three makeup sponges for applying foundation or just blending. I particularly like the tiny sponge for precision work. Since they all have rounded bottoms, none of these sponges stand up on their own which is disappointing. Nevertheless, they are soft and as useful as every other similar type of blending sponge I have tried before. Unfortunately, the current price of $18.99 is OUTRAGEOUS as I can buy a set like this at my local store for about half the price which works just as well.

It’s height adjustable but for table height (not floor). Just what I needed.

Requires the gamepad for local play. Supports Pro controller, classic controller and Pro classic controller.

It tastes very good and is pretty moisturizing but I find myself reapplying it pretty frequently. All in all very nice but not sure if I will be repurchasing at that price.

title: Worked great until it stopped working properly
text: My son feels this is a great mouse for his gaming....Up until last week. Bought this back in December 2017 and now it doesn't work properly. The mouse randomly stops moving when he tries to use it. It just freezes. He has unplugged and tried everything, but does the exact same thing and freezes. He is using an old mouse for now which works just fine. Hopefully the seller can help or we will try the manufacturer. It shows Razer has a 2 year warranty on their mice. For now giving it 2 stars. This mouse is not cheap and should work at least past 2 years.

title: Good enough, but not original
text:
Is it an OLED screen, yes. Does it fit on a PS Vita, yes. There are a number of issues with the details.

1) the housing does not support screwing in the bottom housing
2) the pegs for the thoulder buttons are too large. I had to shave them down and broke the ribbon cables nearby in the process.
3) the speakers are tinny as heck. It sounds ok, but not great.
4) Squeaks so bad. The housing is coming up and scrapped up so the select and start stay recessed.

I would not buy again.

title: Simple & Reliable
text: This scanner works well. Battery life is superb. Set up is simple and directions are straight forward. It is prettymuch plug and play with no fussy downloads. I volunteer at a Humane Society Thrift Store. It is completely volunteer operated. The preious scanner died nd entering information by hand was time consuming and inaccurate. This scanner has been doing a fine job. It is not blazing fast but it is accurate and so far problem free. The store system is basic and about as far from cutting edge as you could imagine but I'e encountered no difficulties. Worthwhile.

title: Generally a good phone but problems with GPS
text:
It's a nice phone; great size (comparable to the iphone, but much thinner and lighter). The main issue I have is that I wanted a smartphone primarily for GPS navigation.

The GPS can find my location (generally), but it cannot track my location and therefore cannot navigate. I tried screwing the screws in tighter, which is the solution that works for many other Samsung galaxy owners (why the screws aren't in properly in the first place is another question), but it does not work for me. Have tried many things but cannot get a lock on the satellites.

title: Enable Chromecast, Amazon, please!

title: It glows for a long time
text:
Once you “charge” up the remote cover with some light, the glow will last all night. It’s pretty cool & really helpful. It fits the remote well & will,
Hopefully, keep me from dropping and breaking it. (The last remote we had looked like I ran it over because I dropped it so often).

The top surface of the mouse, i.e. where the main buttons are, is extremely, disconcertingly slick; I found it unpleasant.

title: The Edge screen- it won't happen

All of the so far can only be attached on the top and bottom - leaving the edges exposed to air. The New S8 is the same - you won't find a screen protector that fits like a flat screen. Just buy Insurance .

title: Works smoothly, very fast on Galaxy Note

Got my new Galaxy Note and was astonished at how good the Audible app really is - full book cover art, smooth play & super fast download of new books. Plus it shows the chapter breakdowns, play, pause, rewind & Fast forward and you can easily access your library with two taps of the finger. Excellent app & one I use every day.

title: The magic of this is

Not to mention once you erase something on this specific paper you can’t write on it the same. The pen boldness is very diminished when writing over old words, I presume from the crevices created from writing on this shiny paper. Any iPhone or droid comes equipped to scan documents so that further defeats the purpose. 100% will just be buying a legal pad and an erasable pen next time.

title: Toner/Serum
text:
A toner/serum combination is a cool concept, and this seems to do a pretty good job of both. By nature, though, a toner kind of evaporates, though, while a serum inks in and stays put.

I am using it in conjunction with a different snail mucin serum and am getting some really nice results. Snail mucin has natural HLA and is also one of the most healing things you can put on your skin.

Especially recommend for use after IR light therapy, derma flash, derma rolling, or any kind of peel.

Styling into medium length hair with a light prestyler.

Scent: Unscented.
Consistency: Wax that’s a bit oily.
Application: It emulsified easily in my hands and applies very smoothly into my hair.
Styling: Pretty responsive. My hair goes where I want it to go.
Finish: Not great. It doesn’t hold too well and leaves my hair looking shiny and untexturized.

title: Very good battle simulations
text:
The non battle strategy play received mediocre reviews at best (I haven't even bothered to play it yet) - but the battles and campaigns are very good.
Running down rows of unsuspecting archers or musketeers from behind with Cavalry is good- and the new Thunder Bombers are devastating if you can get them on a hill shooting down.
The strategy and terrain effects are very good. Some problems with a few quirks and the AI could be better - but overall an excellent game.
Sometimes it charge fast and sometimes it charge slow

title: Really? the PS1 game was better!
text: I absolutely love the Spyro games. That being said, one of my favorite things about the original Playstation Spyro games was the ability to have a little free roaming ability. I loved chasing the sheep and getting the little dragon into trouble. This game doesn't give you that option. You can't go too far out of bounds or it just resets you to where you are "supposed" to be. I was finishing this game at a ridiculous rate without even having to try. The controls are not complicated and fun like the old games. In my opinion, this one isn't worth the money or the time.

title: Great, Until It Wasn't
text:
This mouse started out great. It was difficult to find the correct drivers, which worked fine (I guess). But, eventually (about a week later), the mouse began jumping around as though it was going over something rough underneath. It wasn't. I bought a good mouse pad to eliminate possible interference and it was worse. Tried both hard and soft mouse pads. Not sure what went wrong, but maybe this one was defective.

I bought a wired Logitech G400s Optical Gaming Mouse instead and it's working perfectly.

title: A Bit Disappointed

When I opened the box, the plastic package holding the markers (not the cardboard one it was shipped in) was open and the markers were all over the cardboard box. I don't think we even received all the markers. It was poor quality, but we will still use the markers we received and hope for the best. Lost a lot of stars for not being secure and feeling like the product quality was not met.

title: Love the idea, cheaply made
text: I really like the idea of these. I remember these from when I was a kid, and thought they were great and fun. It's so cool to get all these pens in one. The problem is these are pretty cheaply made. The plastic seems really light and flimsy and breakable. It is definitely not hard for an adult to accidentally break one and since these are for kids, it is not the greatest. It is a great deal for the amount you get, but I think quality is suffering. So it is a balance between the value and seeing if they will hold up to your needs.

title: Very thin barrel and needle point tip. Ink skips.
text: Very thin stick pens with needle tip point. They have a smaller barrel diameter than most technical pens (blue one for comparison) and it's a little too thin for adult hands for long term writing. Needle point tip and ink is great *except* that it "skips" (no ink comes out) appx once per paragraph which is a bit annoying. Very lightweight, plastic, black ink for all styles, cute motif. My teenager thinks they're cute, but the ink skipping is frustrating if you're planning on writing a lot.

title: Lovely intoxicating scent of honeysuckle and jasmine; long lasting
text:
I absolutely LOVE this fragrance. It is lovely and definitely an intoxicating mixture of honeysuckle, jasmine, and some other floral notes. The perfume is long lasting as well and is still detectable after a few hours.

The current price of $49.99 ($54.99 minus $5) is competitively priced for a scent of this quality. It also comes in a lovely tin but the top of my tin was damaged. The bottle this comes in is attractive as well.

I may have just received a defective product, but after having it about a month or two now I am noticing issues. First, the lights on the mouse make a really high pitched sound ALL the time. If I am sitting in a quite room it is actually distracting to me. Second, the mouse wheel has recently picked up a squeak, so as I am scrolling around web pages or in a game it sounds loud and annoys everyone around me.

Overall the functionality of the mouse isn't bad, but the extraneous annoyances are making me wish I had picked up something a bit simpler (and cheaper).

title: zero water resistance.
text:
The ink is black enough, and flows quite well. It's definitely affordable, and very easy to clean up.

However, it doesn't hold up at all to moisture. Perhaps you're ok with this if you're using fountain pens, but if my hands are still damp from washing them I can smear dried ink right off the page.

Also, it bleeds through slightly worse than something like Iroshizuku Shin-kai, which is also not waterproof, but is at least still readable after a smear test. The Waterman black comes right off the page.

title: It's a decent product but certainly not perfect. I bought this for my boyfriend because he ...
text: It's a decent product but certainly not perfect. I bought this for my boyfriend because he is CONSTANTLY losing his wallet. Up until now he's used this as a lazy way to see which pants he's left it in (the beeping function), which is pretty nice. However, we really couldn't find it and the app didn't help very much. It showed up at our current address on the map but while we were standing right next to the wallet the app said that we were far away and for whatever reason the beeping function wasn't working. It has occasionally helped and the price is nice so I would suggest it.

title: Very disappointed

I purchased 2 of these 32gb cards for my phone and my mom's phone (LG Escape). Mine worked for about a month before it died. Then I took the one from my mom's phone and that one lasted about 3 months before it died too. I lost a lot of cherished pictures and videos on that card. My advice to anyone who buys this card, back up your files every day cause you never know when this worthless piece of junk is going to die on you.

In all fairness I haven't attempted to contact any customer service because I'd rather not waste my time with it for something that was less than $50.

title: Game would be a lot of fun if it would stop freezing....

It is really a shame because the game itself is a lot of fun, unfortunately the game freezing is making it a waste of my time to attempt to progress further. The first copy I had I contacted SEGA directly about the defect and they were less then helpful, I exchanged the game through the retailer after the lack of help/concern from SEGA and the second copy is actually worse then the first. I just hope I can get a full refund at this point and purchase a different game.

title: NETFLIX is great!
text:
I really enjoy using NETFLIX. It is user-friendly, very convenient and inexpensive.

The one thing I would change about NETFLIX is the content availability, for example, my children, ages 7 and 8 love to watch movies on NETFLIX and they do have a great selection of children/family content, but at the same time, my kids have access to R-rated, gay-lesbian, horror, etc. I wish they had a setting which I could prevent them from viewing those genres. For now, I just closely monitor them, as any good parent should do anyway!

These have a nice screen and they’re lightweight. Simple functionality overall. We like them a lot.

title: Loved shooting portra 800 !
text:
This film is amazing i have shot two rolls know and both rolls came out great. I especially love it for the colors the film creates. More saturated colors than Kodak's portra 400, with slightly more grain to it. However, my best results are achieved rating this film at ISO 400, no more than ISO 500. Basically, use this film as a portra 400 with higher color saturation. Does not take well to being underexposed.

I got blips and blurbs of only 2 of the 8 local HD broadcasts no matter how I manipulated or placed or aimed or begged this antenna. Additionally it is very very lightweight and I'm sure if you dropped it just once on tile floors, it would break.

I cast this aside in my desk and picked up [[ASIN:B007770QRQ Neon Wallet Case for Nintendo DS- Neon Orange]] as an actual case. I'll pick this back up when I want to turn my blue 3DS red.

title: The best affordable Switch case you can buy
text: I'm really impressed with the quality of this case! I've been using it for a few months now, and it's held up great. title: Nice looking case

On a phone case, you will get much more use than if it were a couch. Anyway, to charge, don't close the case, leave it open. The case has a good amount of slots for identification and charge cards. title: so cute

The sleek design is both stylish and functional, fitting perfectly into your backpack or briefcase. The lightweight construction makes it easy to carry around, while the snug fit ensures that your laptop stays securely in place. Overall, this puffy laptop sleeve is a great investment for anyone looking for reliable laptop protection and a touch of style.

title: Best so far to the solution of storing circular needles

Keeping the needles in their labeled packages is still probably the best way to find the exact size I need. But then they stay curled up and are difficult to knit with. At least this lets the plastic "wires" hang out and uncurl.

title: above average
text:
It has some features I really like, for instance usb port, audio/mic jacks, macro buttons, and a spinning volume knob.

The only real knock I have is the lighting on the keys isn't what I expected. When the lights in my room are off, the bright red shows up pretty well, but the other colors are a little lacking. I notice sometimes when I have blue on, the blue light doesn't reach the very top or bottom of my keys, leading me to think the blue led isn't lined up well.

Either way it is sure to see plenty of good gaming use.

It does not add heaviness, and yet it gives me the clean I am looking after a long run and after a veery sweaty workout. The scent is okay, but I welcome that I can wash my hair with a shampoo that helps in 'soothing' my hair and not strip it dry. recommend if you need to wash your hair daily and dont want to condition it eery time.

text: The frame is laminated press board, NOT wood. One corner wasn't done well, exposing the interior. I would not have purchased this had I known. It will be used for a less visible task and we'll make our own with the quality we had expected.

title: Dialogue in the wrong place
text: I found the game very difficult at the boss level. Also, it would have been much better, if when you died, you didn't have to go thru all the dialogue over and over. I never finished the game because I got bored. I recommend this game for people with alot of patience.

title: They are O.K.
text: Not an exact fit but close enough, a little difficult to line up and adhesive was not that strong. But for the price I'm satisfied.

title: I can't tell if it works.
text:
I can't tell if it really does anything. Internet fearmongering pressured me to buy antivirus, so I got this.

Might just be an umbrella on a sunny day, as it never detects any viruses. It scans, or says it scans, and it updates itself. But it's anyone's guess if it works or not.

But I don't want to really test it either...so meh.

So I'll keep buying if I don't get viruses, but I can't give more than a "meh" review if I can't tell if it works or not.

title: First Impressions
text: I just installed it. Haven't tested but plugging in one USB device. But my first impressions are that it feels cheap for the price paid.

title: Cheap Chinese Knock Off
text: The wire gauge is much smaller than the name brand. I sent it back.

title: Too complicated. Too confusing. I gave up.
text:
I somehow muddled my way through the original Dishonored, but gave up on the Clockwork Tower level of this one.

You never have the right weapons, the right amount of ammo, and the hints and tips provided are useless.

Unless you want play a game that will frustrate you for hours, skip this one.

title: Writes well
text: As expected. Glides nicely on paper.

title: Fun game
text: I enjoy p!aging it but you do loose your life quickly

title: Work well so far!
text:
These seem to work like the original Brother refills. I haven’t used one totally yet, so I can not attest to how long these last.
They are less expensive and are carefully packaged and skillfully manufactured.

title: Holds phone tight
text:
It does hold onto the phone tightly. It stretches nicely to fit my iPhone 11 with an Otterbox. The webbing does NOT block the camera, which is a big plus! The anchor strap lashes onto my bike’s handle bar very well. The way that the strap latches shut is not the most secure as it is just the pressure of the stretched band on a hook holding it on, rather than a more secure method. Don’t get me wrong, it works just fine for low impact activities, but I wouldn’t use it for an extreme mountain biking run.
It is a Great option for the price!

title: Don’t bother.
text: It’s nothing less than a microfiber cloth, not for short hair, I thought that somehow it would help my hair but not. I have plenty of microfiber cleaning cloth for mirrors and dusting. Too $$$ for what it is.

title: Almost perfect !!
text:
I love this keyboard, there are a couple things that if changes would make it the perfect board for me.

1st) We have to acknowledge that flex. If you’re a heavy typist like me, then it’s gonna flex on you. A rubber stopper, strategically placed in the middle of the back of the board goes a long way though.

2nd) It NEEDS multimedia keys. All the RGB controls are great and all, but can I get some volume up/down, and play/pause functions?

Address those and this will be the ultimate for office and gaming.

title: Ok
text:
These sign holders can be very easily tipped over.
If you’re going to use these, consider using double sided tape to mount your sign holder in your desired location. The brand is WINBLO… and the wind will blow them over… I can literally blow them over with very little effort.
They are very clear when the protective film is removed, but I found a few small scratches and scuffs on the backside of the plastic.
I broke one when attempting to remove it from the packaging. It was surprisingly easy to break.
At a little over $3 each, I guess they’re ok if you have mounting tape.

title: Youtube!

Crocked however you want me to say it. Third due to it being uneven sound quality isnt great. No noise cancelation and its not as loud as i would like it. Last its uncomfortable period

title: Game boy advance strawberry shortcake

title: Cool product, 6 month life span

title: Work great

They're difficult to get on and the hand straps are really uncomfortable though- scratchy thin material. I'm thinking they'll hold up well so I'm giving these four stars for "good job" but also uncomfortable straps.

title: Hold the switch, wish it had room for cord management

title: Good case and good protection
text: I like the iPhone 8+ cases made by Speck Products. This case is a matte black that resists scratching. It also fits iPhone 7+. The phone can be dropped from 10 feet and be protected by two layers that have been molded together to create. One layer is polycarbonate, the other is Impactium, which is a rubber. Together, they create a case that is shock absorbing and offers great protection within a slim case that looks great.

title: The AI is terrible in this game
text:
The AI is terrible in this game. Bad guys will literally walk right past a group of soldiers because their BUILDING radius determines their engage radius apparently. You cant tell buildings to do things like "attack strongest", or "dont fire all your cannons at the 1 dude at 1% health", or "please shoot the dude whos about to escape, instead of the new who just showed up in range".

I appreciate the no IAPs, but slow gameplay and horrible AI really killed it for me.

title: Broke in less than a week of use

title: Very easy to use too much
text: I have thick waist length coarse hair that I style with one of those blow drying brushes. I usually have to use more than directed on products bc of the amount of hair that I have. This product says to use a little, but I used about a nickels amount of product, combed through and was left with areas that were very weighed down. It's difficult to use a little and disperse it thinly through my hair. It does provide a smoothing effect, but I don't particularly like how easy it is to over do it and leave my hair feeling gunky

title: Better luck next time

title: Not good for stickers/crafting

I can see these only being good for packing labeles. Do not buy for crafting

title: good fragrance, nice lotion
text:
The bottle may seem like it's a gender neutral scent but yeah, this is for a guy - the lingering notes are woodsy and not feminine or 'light' at all, and they last a good long time. Fair warning. It's not overpowering, but it's got good staying power. It does absorb well and it's good at moisturizing, too, without leaving your skin feeling too 'tacky', but I've tried some better moisturizing lotions out there.
So decent moisturizer but definitely carries a scent.

title: Excellent!

The headset comes with an auto-pairing USB dongle which gives you Bluetooth connectivity. The connection was great and I didn't have a problem with it disconnecting during the game. This is a must-have for gamers.

title: Lots of paper clips ..
text:
A nice bunch of paper clips here. No, I didn't count them, but the container is fairly large and it's packed. There are three sizes -- the smaller two sizes are very similar (maybe 1/8" difference), but the large ones are definitely larger. They seem to be nice quality, too. The container has dividers that seem to keep them organized.

I go through a lot of these -- I'm my homeowners association treasurer and have to produce paperwork that can't be stapled for various reasons, so paper clips are the best alternative. These will last a good long time. No issues, really.

title: Works Well with the Switch
text: I was very happy that this was easy to sync with the Switch. Basically, just hold the Home button and go to the Settings / Controller / Find Group Order. After the initial pairing the controller now always works with the Switch. I prefer this controller to the Joy Cons that come with the console. Another plus - this charges with a USB-C instead of the old Micro-USB. With USB-C there is no upside-down (as there is with Micro-USB) so there is less chance to damage the charging port when inserting the charge cable.

title: Sturdy & Durable & Easy To Mount

title: Causes interference on SNES
text:
This cable works OK, but the picture doesn't look great.
This Cord is "Sync on Composite" which means it will cause a subtle diagonal interference pattern on the SNES picture.
To get a clear picture you need to get a "Composite Sync / CSync / Clean Sync" cable, which is generally only available on Ebay.

The game is a great concept is great fun to play - until it "locks up". In our home, we call it the "slider game" because you slide tiles to match pairs. The pair is then eliminated from the board. "Winning" is to eliminate all the pairs on the board. My problem may be my tablet or may be the game programming. It works on my spouse's tablet without problems. Go figure.

title: holds your cellphone just 2 inches above the table height
text: I got this tripod mostly to use with my cellphone. The way the cellphone mount is built, it holds the phone just 2 inches above the table height and there is no height adjustment. That means you will have to aim very carefully to keep the tabletop out of your photos. You can put the tripod on top of a stack of books, but that is awkward at best. Also, the tripod legs are hard plastic including the ends and is not real stable on a smooth slippery tabletop.

title: Works well but
text: Works well alone but I purchased this to have TWO rf remotes in the bedroom-one on each side of the bed. After trying with dish and getting no results that worked, it seems you can only use one at a time, even if you give bothe the same address. Don't need a remote that will not work.

title: Works okay but I still manage to cut myself
text: I have an issue with blades. Unfortunately, the last ones I used cut my legs up. Afterwards, found out that they had an issue and I had to stop using them. So, because it had been a while, I first used an electric shaver to mow down the forest. Then I used the shaver to catch the other hairs I missed and to get a closer shave. I still missed some and I still cut myself. But, one little cut is nothing compared to four or five. The kit is worth getting and using. These kits always do a better job than disposable shavers.

title: Doesn't fit.
text:
Very pretty, just like in the pictures - - Doesn't fit the advertised phone though. My phone is the same specs and everything is VERY close, but the buttons don't totally line up which makes them hard to press and the case looks a bit tight.

Had to stick with the one the manufacturer gave me instead.

title: Not a fan.
text: Not a fan of this product. Magnet is strong. Holds the phone in place. However, its hard to pull off the holder without pulling it off the vent. I tightened it pretty tight and now the adhesive that holds the magnet part on the phone, came off. Will look for something else.

title: Still got error message.
text: I bought the original manufacturer part because the generic ones I had kept giving me an error message. The price is fair for a Dell part. This one ALSO gave me an error message half the time. Maybe it’s my computer ...

title: Not a fan.

title: Great

title: Made in Brazil. A bit pricey, but nice overall.
text:
This is a pack of three spiral notebooks. 1 Red. . . 1 Green. . . 1 Blue. 100 sheets. Thick front / back cardboard covers. Pocket folder on the inside front. Micro perforated along the edge, which I really like.

These spiral notebooks are Made in Brazil. At the current price of eleven bucks. . . . I think they are quite expensive for what they are. . . . but. . . . overall they are nice.

title: Broken within a few months. Don't waste your $!

title: Ended up not using this
text: I put this on my new PS5 controller.. I liked the feel of it, and it fits well. However - there is an issue with the opening where the PlayStation button is - the hole is shaped like the button. The button is barely raised off of the surface of the controller - so with this skin on it is hard to press that button, as it's pretty much just below the surface of the skin. I thought about making that opening larger using a hole punch - but just decided the not use this and maybe look for something else. The covers for the caps were a bit hard to get on, but they do stay on once they are there.

I think they would work better with wet erease markers.

title: Smooth High Quality Paper your Fountain Pens Will Love
text:
Clairefontaine is a brand that creates butter smooth paper. This paper is ideal for writing with fountain pens, and makes the writing experience a dream. You'll want to look out for an extended drying time, but these pads are well worth the price.
The pads themselves have a good number of pages, and are fairly comfortable to write in either flat or folded.

title: It will work for me
text: The SATA cables were just long enough (drawn very tight) to connect to my ASUS F!A75-M mother board. 20, or 24 inches long would have been much better. My board is an mATX so if you have an ATX board or different configuration of components on your board, 18 inch long cables may not work for you. You would be better off buying the bracket less the cables and buying your own cables.

Then I tried serval's different was restarting and it is still froze in that same spot.

title: Heals and Peels
text:
If you are looking for a way to stop a breakout this is a good option. The spot treatment is a gel with salicylic acid, witch hazel and sandalwood oil. This tends to dry out acne or spots fairly quickly. As soon as the alcohol and water have evaporated it leaves a slight film on the skin to protect the area being treated. I noticed my skin does peel a bit when using this product. I'd use this for a day or two and then switch to a healing salve like [[ASIN:B00GM77XPA Renaud Naturals In the Pink Herbal Balm 2 Oz]].

~The Rebecca Review

title: Key features locked behind auto renewal
text:
Key features the app is advertised to have are locked behind activating auto renewal - converting the "Total protection" package to something more akin to their Antivirus Plus product line unless you give McAfee your CC# and agree to renew at their prices. Total protection has its own firewall that you can turn off - but the current version of Windows 10 (21h2) will not let you turn on the built in windows firewall unless you also turn on windows defender - which disables Mcafee entirely.

Pretty misleading.

In Color

title: No sound unless connected JUST RIGHT
text:
Purchased these as they seemed to get good reviews. I plugged them up to my PS4 controller, and when you move the controller, the sound cuts out. I have to wiggle the connection. I thought it might be my controller, even though I hadn’t had issues with m old headset, so I tried it in another device and it did the same thing. I can hear sound if the connection is JUST RIGHT, but I move the controller too much to make this usable. This was unfortunately a waste of money.

Not recommended.

title: Good Value
text: It's been a while since we've gotten any new phone chargers. They tend to last a while then next thing you know, they don't and you need to replace it. I usually keep a few spares, but my collection of spares had dwindled away to nothing. These are decent quality. They seem to charge fine. I don't notice the charging time to be super fast or slow. They're a good value.

title: An excellent CPU for the money
text:
I good CPU. Very quick at base speed with no over heating issues with it's supplied CPU cooler. It multitasks nicely and is a far cry up from a quad core.

I've been using this cpu on a Gigabyte 970-FX board for about a year and I'm impressed how rock solid this inexpensive cpu is. I have mine turbo clocked to 3800MHZ with the stock cooler/heat sink and the cpu temp stays under 53C but I have a large case with 4 fans and one 120mm blowing on the cpu. At normal load it runs about 48C and I don't think I've seen it climb past 51C.

title: Not as good a deal as it used to be
text:
I bought a Kindle Keyboard in early 2011, and when it was stolen spring, 2012, I bought another one. Unfortunately, in the interim, Amazon decided to make customers pay for the "privilege" of not having intrusive ads on their machine. Ugh. In addition, the painted letters on the keyboard wore off after only a few months of use.

I have switched over to using my husband's Kindle Fire and almost never use the Keyboard anymore. I like the touch screen much, much better, and it has a huge amount more functionality for the extra cost.

title: Misleading Photo and Product Page
text:
First of all, the photo shows 2 - and other sellers offer 2-packs or 2-fer pricing. I got one.
Secondly, there are a choice of two quantities: 1 and 72. 72? Realizing that was a typo when only $10, thought it was actually "2", as the price was not quite double what it was for one. It arrived as 1 - not 2 - not 72.

title: Decent

I selected this system largely because of the battery option which makes it workable even during an outage. Set up was straightforward. The battery compartment is hard to open. Although it has many desirable features it lacks call block, something I find indispensable. The caller idea works fine. Quality overall is good CD and you can easily add on if need be.

title: Buy the Black Extra Fine Nib Instead
text: At the time I ordered this nib I also purchased the Extra Fine nib in black at the same due to limited stock. Unfortunately, this one is inferior to the black one that I bought at the same time. I was so surprised at the difference, that I actually switched the nibs on the pens they were on just to make sure that it was the nib and not some issue with the pen itself. The black one seems to have less of a scratch effect to it and the ink flow is much more consistent. I would consider the black nib very good while this one is just OK. Neither is as good as some of the Japanese nibs I have used.

title: Terrible - Good luck uninstalling

I really appreciated all the extra FREE goodies that were also included in the package, so for the affordable price, this wig is a great quality piece that will definitely bring compliments! 👄

title: quantity not quality
text:
800,000 images without keywords - the only useful parts of this collection are the classic and traditional .tif's that you can take into illustrator and turn into vector. The high res images aren't, the clipart is less than microsoft office online quality and I've gotten far more use out of a 50,000 image collection b/c they took the time to keyword and catagorize the collection.

If you like to look thru a book and put in one of the 32 disks and then find the image - then this collection is for you. If you want to have any sort of search capabilites, look elsewhere.

title: Bluetooth Label Maker
text: Small portable bluetooth thermal label printer. I really wanted to love this, the size is great, it hooks up to your phone easy, the app is relatively simple to use, and it prints quickly. However I am not happy with the quality of the actual printer. As you can see on my testing labels some fonts do not print completely. The fonts that do print more full are still not crisp. I wont use this for anything where the label will show and it will be fine but if you are looking for a portable easy to use label maker with crisp images - this is probably not the product for you.

text: I've had these headphones for 2 years now up to the date of this review. Inexpensive and adequate but obviously not for the audiophile! Light so they don't hurt your ears after long wear. Dynamic range is within it's price range. A reasonable value for a knock around set of headphones. The vinyl coating over the ear covers has worn off on both sides and the covering flakes off onto you when you wear them. I guess it might have been affected by how I must put them on and off. Still using them and they still provide adequate sound.

These pens are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. There are several different Chinese companies selling these same pens on Amazon. So look around for the best price per-pen.

title: I'm using it with Mac OS 10.7
text: See my comment below for a web address to obtain updated drivers for Mac. The speeds I'm getting are comparable to those of my internal drive and an sd card in an express adapter. MUCH faster than USB 2.0 or firewire 800. Since my Macbook Pro is too old for Mountain Lion, I can't test those drivers, but the Lion driver on the site in my comment works perfectly. Just put the card in the slot, install the driver, and restart with the card in the slot.

title: Comfortable Pen (Likely Old Stock)
text: I've been a fan of Dr. Grip pens since they were introduced over 20 years ago. I even have one of the pencils. I got the Brights line YEARS ago and forgot to get a purple at the time. I was only able to get a Blue and Green. So, seeing this on Amazon, I got the purple one. Strong, sturdy, durable pen. Caution though - while they are brand new (in the package), they're likely old stock so you might want to have some refills on hand just in case. Mine quite after writing less than 50 words. But they are a great pen!

title: Sound quality? Amazon wants me to rate sound quality? These do not have
text:
anything to do with the sound. That comes from the speakers...

But these did restore my old mPow cans to service. I was tired of the little black flecks from the old rotted out earpads getting all over the place. (Hey! Why does Amazon spellcheck red squiggly underline "earpads" here when the title says, well, earpads? I ask you..)

Fiddly to install but worth it to ban the annoying little black flecks...

Hey! Spellcheck does not like Bezos! Bozo is OK but not Bezos. Yikes, IT folks, this best not get to his level.

The box comes with 22 containers of powder. There are also bottles of base coat, top coat, activator, and brush saver. It also includes a file, brush, and instructions.

I will not be recommending this Morovan Dip Powder Nail Kit to family and friends.

text: The Pilot Metropolitan is no doubt the best writing experience I've had in years. At this price range pens are usually cheap, scratchy, plastic, chinese and overall bad pens. The closest thing to this is a Jinhao X750.

title: Don't do it!
text: Seriously! You'll lose hours a day playing this game. Very simple and addicting game. I liken it to Tetris without the falling blocks. The wife has the high score...at the moment. Dammit.

title: Lightly moisturized my body in the shower but this causes the tub floor to become dangerously slippery
text: I purchased a bottle of Nivea body wash and a sample of this "in-shower body lotion" was attached. As instructed, I rubbed it all over my body and rinsed off. It left my skin feeling nice and smooth and somewhat moisturized. However, as the lotion is rinsing off, the bottom of the tub or shower gets very slick. I would never purchase this because of that as it can cause a serious fall. Also, I find moisturizing outside the shower with a regular moisturizer to provide better results. If it did not make the shower slippery, I would have rated this 4 stars.

title: Cute
text: This is a cute little notebook that would fit into most bags. It’s great for jotting notes or lists. It comes with an additional note book for when the first one is used up. It has a bookmark and seems durable

title: it has a strong scent for men
text: remember the commercials; "manly yes, but i like it too." they were funny. you can watch them on youtube. i put a 6th of a bar , in to melt with my other soaps, when making liquid soap, so it turns green. if you don't live with mosquitoes, you may like the strong perfume smell.

title: You can only play for so long before you have to pay to go further
text: My daughter loves this game. You have to build different shakes. The problem is to unlock more shakes you have to do 5 different versions of one type to unlock the next....not a big deal but the problem is that once you get to the 4th try on the first shake...you can not go any further without buying upgrades. It is aggravating and the bake shop version of this game is the exact same way. It has probably 10 different shakes but you can only do 4/5 of the first one then you are stuck buying things. Not really worth it.

title: No way this is new
text:
I bought this "New" as a gift to myself instead of buying a friend's used one. I should have bought the used one, since this one is obviously not new and I paid full price for it. I'm not even sure it's going to work as the HDMI is bent. The seal stickers weren't adheared to the box when I opened it and the plastic film wasn't attached to the base stations.
Aside from the USED item being shipped to me, the HTC Cosmos is very high quality. I played the older Vive model for a year and this headset is superior.
I'm upset about receiving an open item at full price.

title: Perfect for my MIL with dementia
text:
I buy this product for my mother in law who has dementia. It's convenient for her caregivers to use one product to bathe her. It was also a great product for her to use when she was still able to bathe herself, too. The only downside would be that it doesn't condition her hair as well as using a separate conditioner, but that isn't what is advertised so no knocks there. I like that the ingredients are clean and I can trust that my MIL is getting a quality product.
Thank you

It has gotten wet once and liquid easily got through the microphone area. No damage, but wondering why I am lugging it around still.

So I'm having to reposition it but then it's not long enough to get me the distance I need.

title: Dimensions listed are incorrect

The units are basic wire mesh tack welded together. The units are functional. The upper portions of the unit attach with clever plastic "rivets" which hold the U shaped mesh dividers to the units.

Fortunately I found another location for the mesh dividers in my office.

~The Rebecca Review

title: Choose another brand

The real problem was that the cardboard backing became separated from the calendar sheets and now they won't stick to the wall. Now it's nearly useless. A waste of money, and a mistake I won't make again.

That said; I'll probably give it to my son, because there's no way to turn the lights down or off that I've found, and the red light is just a little too glaring for me.

Obviously, if you are a Civilization fan, you should buy this just to support them. Maybe Civ 7 will be better...

title: good idea
text:
After locking myself out of the house, someone recommended getting a combination lock box like this that is bolted to the house. Because the bolt is inside, it can't be easily taken off and broken open. I tested the combination and it works well. My husband, however, refused to install it for me due to not feeling safe having a key outside.

I would recommend this if you live alone and don't have someone nearby to give a spare key to. But do hid it well - like behind a bush or plant pot.

title: The Price is Right! Cool Features!
text:

Anyways, I feel I could still comment on this particular wall mount.

Please don't be like me and just assume it will fit your tv. Ask questions before you order it!

title: Doesn't Leave My Hair Looking Greasy
text: My biggest concern for using this hair lotion was that it would leave my hair looking greasy. It doesn't, so that's a relief! I apply it after towel drying my hair. I have chin length hair, so I have been adding a little less than recommended. I work it into the damp hair, then I usually let my hair air dry for about an hour before blow drying it. While it doesn't make my hair greasy, I really don't notice any difference in the thickness. My hair is pretty soft, but not softer than usual. I will continue to use it until it runs out, but as of now, I'm not seeing any difference.

title: A stable, light-weight travel tripod
text: This tripod offers the best combination of features I have seen in travel tripods. My past frustrations is that they are mostly too short and not adaptable enough. This one allows for a full-height experience while being very light and quite stable. My only mild complaint is that the twist knobs on the legs are a bit sticky.

title: Beautiful band
text:
Just what I wanted in a band. I get so many compliments on this band. I wish it was a little more pink and a little less peachy but that's ok. I highly recommend this band and would buy another one!

Update:. Rose gold chips away quickly and watch corrodes with sweat. My last metal Rose gold band lasted over a year. This one only lasted a few months. Lowering rating from 5 to 3

title: Ring on the back came off.
text:
I bought this case last year and only note realized I never wrote the review.

The ring on the back snapped away from the swivel portion in less than three months. It was great while I had it, but it didn't last long.

The case itself has protected my phone well enough, but that ring, embedded as it is in the case and not prone to falling off like a pop socket, was the seedling feature for me.

I hate that there's no way to delete the motion videos that it took. Regardless if you reformat the SD card or not. After having 2 cameras up for a while I have to say this brand has ALOT of false alarms. You play back the video and there's nothing there that should've tripped a motion alarm. Deduct 2 star for that.

I have to wonder if the intent is for some sort of electronic tablet as well, especially since it is a little more 'open' and adjustable than some portfolio's I've seen. It has some great pockets and tabs to put in items like cards and badges, yet is still on the slim side and can be tucked into other bags/briefcases/satchels. It's a great size for carrying around.

I now had to put a pin on my phone but I'm concerned about apps that request a fingerprint to authorize usage.

By 'functional,' I mean a pen is supposed to be used to write...but if the ink keeps skipping, it can't be used to do what it's supposed to do. So overall I'm not very satisfied and would encourage other would-be buyers to try your luck with another fountain pen.

title: Works Well

However, the board is dense and a little difficult to get push pins into. Not exactly a problem, since I'd rather have that than have the pins falling out. My other issue is that it looks very commercial. It looks like it belongs on the wall of a cubicle, not on the wall of my homeschool room. So, aesthetically, it is a little lacking. But functionally, it works really well, so I am happy.

title: One of the best WWI Flight combat sims around to this day

Practice and be patient, and after awhile some of the easier planes will be fun to fly into combat. Great graphics, and should run well in any recently bought computer nowadays. Developer continues to refine the game, and add new features and planes (some cost extra). Well worth it. Must use a joystick, preferably one optimized for flying.

title: Get better or get out

I was skeptical at first that it didn’t go around the buttons but now I think I prefer it so that there isn’t a build up of gunk. My 6 year old twins put their switch lites through a lot of rough treatment (accidental drops, etc) and so far the two cases I ordered are holding up great.

Have tried a small amount as well as generous amount and it does not matter. I get the same result. Sorry, just didn't work for me. I rather use shea butter, water, profectiv and keeps my edges in place all day!

title: A good starter keyboard
text: Pros: the price (if you can get it on sale), physical size, ease of connectivity to my phone, the time it takes to wake up from sleep mode and the weight of the overall keyboard. It is quite heavy for this size. Cons: the F & J key bumps are not as profound as I would like them. I constantly have to look down at the keyboard to make sure my fingers are where they're supposed to be. Another con is the surfact texture of the keycaps. I'm not a big fan of sandy textured keycaps. Overall, 3.5 out of 5 stars.

title: It's lightweight and as a result it's not very stable
text: It's lightweight and as a result it's not very stable. I've knocked over a few times just swiping the screen. Otherwise, the design is pretty good and fits my Pixel phone with a thin case with room to spare. I'll probably replace it with something more substantial that supports rapid charging and resign this one to my travel kit, but really in a pinch you'd be hard pressed to find a better dock for the price of this one.

title: Not my favorite
text: Going by the name, I expected a silky feel. There isn't one. This is like a watered down sunblock. It has a light sunblock scent. It has a light cast, but it's okay if you don't overdo it and massage it around well. This was boxed and the tube had a foil seal. For the price ($24.99), there are others I prefer.

title: I like this game, but ...
text: I like this game, but it gave me a headache at least on my Sony PS4. It crippled the PS4 OS several times, and I had to re-install/rebuild the PS4 OS more than just one time. However, I played it at least twice, for the game was a wonderful experience for this old man. I wonder if anyone had some issues like having to re-install the game several times, and having to rebuild the PS4 more than 3 times to make the game work. Don't get me wrong, but I love the game and all its characters which are well-developed and have interesting story to tell.

These Clips fill the Bill. Since they’re not plastic, they’re much sturdier than the cutesy chip bag closures and can stand up to freezing.

I take frequent breaks on between numbering to relieve the discomfort in my wrist, wear my reading glasses to reset and try not to use too much ink. I am happy I bought it no regrets!

text: Like so many have stated in their review, the range is terrible. Anything beyond a couple of feet and the signal will be lost, causing the remote to stop working until it regains the signal. I used a USP extension cable I had and attached the transmitter to the side of my desk. Now the distance is only 2 feet from the gamepad. As a result everything works fine. However, this gamepad would be useless for anyone wanting to use it more than 2 feet from the transmitter.

She felt it would not stand up over time to protect her devices.

title: Fun, but...
text: This game is a very good baseball game packed with tons of options and features, but...if you don't read the manual the game will seem like it doesn't function right. Without knowing how to pitch, you will throw wild pitches. etc. Many of the negative reviews are from people who played the game for an hour and didn't bother to learn about the controls. I ghaven't thrown a wild pitch since reading the manaul. This is a great baseball game for those wanting games and a sim.

These are the most comfortable buds I have used in a while. I have Air Pros and they hurt my ears, as do many other types I have tried.

title: Decent computer
text:
Purchased with the intention of loading a different O/S. Booting this thing to anything other than Windows 8 that was included is a near impossibility. For the included operating system, it works great. Decent speed and performance of all component to complete most household tasks and then some.

If you're looking for a decent lower cost home computer, this is a good fit. If you plan to install a different O/S and use it for some other purpose, I recommend you keep searching.

I haven't been as daring as everyone else in trying to 'doctor' up the case (by slicing through the leather) and don't think I will try it. I will use it as is.

It smells nice - very floral, but not an overwhelming scent. My skin feels nice and clean and soft after a shower with this. I like it, but I'm not entirely convinced that it is worth a ten dollar purchase.

title: Poor electronics - causes radio and audio issues in two of our vehicles

And, in my Toyota 2006 Sienna, when plugged in to charge my phone, there is audible buzz and hum in the background when playing Pandora, mp3's, etc through a 1/8" stereo audio input to the radio auxilliary input.. It does charge things fine, but unfortunately, this may be a knockoff because the electronics within do not suppress hum at all, which makes it useless.

title: Great keyboard but RGB light settings are disappointing
text: The keyboard quality is amazing and this is a well built study product, but the RGB LEDs could be improved. LED colors don't transition smoothly between two colors in any of the settings that aren't the rainbow. This can probably be fixed with a firmware update but this issue has not been acknowledged by CM and any concerns on their own forums have been ignored so far.

title: A must-have for coil building
text:
Although I use the PC version most of the time, it's nice to have it on my tablet for when the PC is not handy. It's considered by many to be the standard for calculating coil resistances, and it's well-deserved. Very simple to use and offers both quick answers if you just want to get basic results, as well as a lot of detailed data should you want to dive in further. A must-have for coil building.

I do prefer the interface and options available on the PC more than the app, but this has the great advantage of portability.

title: A nice ink, but not my favourite
text: I have three Private Reserve blue inks in my collection, and they are: American Blue, D.C. Supershow Blue, and Midnight Blues. Of these, American Blue is the lightest, though a true blue; D.C. Supershow Blue is a nicely saturated blue; and Midnight Blues is almost a blue-black when used with a wet nib, and in comparison to the other two, this ink seems to have a somewhat purplish cast. Each of these blues shows a bit of shading, with American Blue seeming to show this characteristic the most. My favourite of these blues is D.C. Supershow Blue, being a clear and vibrant shade of royal blue.

title: Good quality headphones at a reasonable price
text: Turtle Beach headphones. My son and his cousin have been raving for these for so long. Now it is their birthdays and I gave them to them. The house is quiet now. There is a volume control on the wire that plugs into the controllers. The mic was a little tricky. You need to line up the slot on the opening with the part that sticks out to get the mic to stay in. If you don't line theses up, the mic will swivel and continue to fall out. When in doubt, read the directions.

title: Wonderful pen

title: Bubbles pop when simply handling
text: I purchased these for shipping books. They are the correct size, but just carrying them some of the bubbles pop, negating, to some extent, the purpose of bubble wrap. Plastic seems thinner, too. Still, would be useful for most books, but I wouldn't dare put a heavier book is these to ship. All in all, I don't think I'd buy this particular item again.

title: Way too bright at night, otherwise great.
text: I got a new Kindle to replace my 6 year old one that started to get lines in the display. There’s not an enormous difference, but the type is a bit crisper. The interface is still slow (which is fine). My big issue is the light is SO BRIGHT. Even at the lowest setting, it is many times brighter than the older kindle, which makes it unusable at night when I’m trying not to wake my partner. This can be fixed with a firmware update, so fingers crossed.

title: Battery analyzer...outstanding features
text:
The charger/analyzer works exactly as advertised. The included C-Cell and D-cell AA adapters are a nice bonus. Helps to identify if one of your batteries is not well matched to others by mAH or charge... I would highly recommend . Have used to test multiple brands of 1200, 1600, 1800 and 2200 mAH batteries

UPDATE: 5+ years later and still working flawlessly...

title: Standard legal paper - doesn't ship well

Overall, it would be a better idea to purchase legal paper from a store than to have it shipped through Amazon.

This conditioner was very good. It was easy to use. It went in quite well. I felt like it got my hair very smooth. It felt nice afterwards.

The scent was good. It wasn’t too strong. It smelled nice.

I thought this did a very good job of leaving my hair nice. It felt good after. It was easier to comb. I would recommend it.

title: EZConvert 2.5-Inch to 3.5-Inch SATA SSD / Hard Drive Converter by Icy Dock
text: I purchased this EZConvert 2.5-Inch to 3.5-Inch SATA SSD / Hard Drive Converter by Icy Dock to mount a new 2.5" Solid State Drive in my PC. I decided to not use it, but for the price it is a nice rack converter for the little Drive. Plastic is secure when the drive is inserted and it plugs into the sata connector to all the plug to be accessed at the end of the box. It is a good way to mount your drive if you are confident the plastic box with holes will not get hot. I was not and just used a mount that exposed my drive to the air flow movement of the front fan.

title: Love it
text: My sleep is so much better! Even have an easier time incorporating it with meditation to reduce distractions and really be in the moment. Plus, my family can visually see "Mom is busy!"

title: Would love to love this....
text:
This little device is so close. Unfortunately there's no way to map mouse scroll wheel function to the knob which is a big bummer. All the major apps I use make significant use of the scroll wheel :(

Other than that, the buttons work. Key stroke combos are limited to 3 keystrokes.

title: Rockin' Bass! LOUD
text: I returned $50 Edifiers because these have much better bass and more trilling guitar highs and are just more... LOUDER! Plus I need the earloops for them to stay in my left ear. Only caveats they seem just slightly right of center and the case isn't charging. I listen to mostly stadium rock and these fit the bill like my Sony and Mpow headphones. For $15 they're a definite keep.

title: Adhesive Not Durable

title: Flimsy and Doesn't Erase Well

title: No On/Off Button

Will order a replacement & use this as a 'gang' plug-in. Other units also have USB ports & longer cords. Like the brand, not satisfied with this unit.

An HP or Brother cartridge slides in smoothly and securely, while these slide in awkwardly and never feel like they are sitting right. Too bad, I love the price.

They look fantastic and are big, so if you like flashy, this has got it! And their sound is solidly good. It is not great. title: SquareTrade Comes Through Again
text: I've gotten a number of warranties through SquareTrade, and recently had to use one for my second time (the first time was for a stick blender - they refunded me via Amazon. This time, my iPod Touch had problems - the sound kept cutting out. I submitted a claim, SquareTrade emailed me the UPS label, I send the iPod as per directions, and nine days later a box arrived from a company I was unfamiliar with. I opened it and there was my iPod, as good as new and working perfectly. All in all, I'm very happy with SquareTrade, and plan to keep using them.

It comes in a nice little pump dispenser bottle making it easy to use. The moisturizer is lightweight and absorbs quickly into the skin. It doesn't leave any residue behind which is great. The skin looks and feels great when I use this. All in all very happy with it.

The mono bluetooth amplifier is underpowered and low quality. If you have some DIY skills, you can replace the speaker and the amplifier, and turn this to a decent bluetooth system. Otherwise, it is disappointing.

title: Has to be a more comfortable option out there for people who will be wearing ...
text: This headset worked for a week, before the mic stopped transmitting. During that time it was decent sound through the earphones, and okay sound quality from the mic. The ear phone pads hurt my ears because they don't go over the ear and instead rest on them. They held me over when I was without my Logitech G930 for a week, but I would not wear these things full time. Has to be a more comfortable option out there for people who will be wearing their headsets for more than 30 minutes at a time, and a sturdier headset for those who will be using theirs for more than a week.

title: Inaccurate for Texas and Louisiana
